fields.name: Capacity Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of capacity for the calendar entry.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that this capacity refers to.

fields.name: Work Shift Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies code for the work shift that the capacity refers to.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting time of this calendar entry.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending time of this calendar entry.

fields.name: Work Center No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the work center number if the capacity entry is directly assigned to a work center.
If this entry is assigned to a machine center and this machine center is assigned to a work center, then the number of the work center is shown here.

fields.name: Work Center Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the work center group if the work center or the machine center was assigned to a work center group.

fields.name: Capacity (Total)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total capacity of this calendar entry.

fields.name: Capacity (Effective)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the effective capacity of this calendar entry.

fields.name: Efficiency
fields.tooltip: Specifies the efficiency of this calendar entry.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity of this calendar entry.

fields.name: Absence Efficiency
fields.tooltip: Specifies the efficiency that is lost because of an absence.

fields.name: Absence Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity that is lost due to an absence.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the starting time, which are combined in a format called "starting date-time".

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the ending time, which are combined in a format called "ending date-time".
